Result.HoldReason: Prevents a permit inspection from being scheduled on any permits (master or sub) when this type of hold is placed on the record.
Result.Comments: E&SC inspection hold placed due to lack of maintenance to E&SC control measures and slight sediment present in buffer. Contact Spencer Bowman @ 919-896-9113 or spencer.bowman@wake.gov
